sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64155" key="luphsi/logos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῡπ-ησίλογος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n64155.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giving pain by talking</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:343" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">343</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
